name: GNINA
description: Autodock Vina with CNN scoring function to rescore output poses. Outperforms AutoDock Vina on redocking and cross-docking tasks (Top1 increases from 58% to 73% and from 27% to 37%, respectively). Predict how small molecules bind to receptors given sdf ligand file and pdb protein structure.
capabilities: Autodock Vina with CNN scoring function to rescore output poses
Outperforms AutoDock Vina on redocking and cross-docking tasks (Top1 increases from 58% to 73% and from 27% to 37%, respectively)
Predict how small molecules bind to receptors given sdf ligand file and pdb protein structure

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

center_x.description: X coordinate of the binding box center

center_y.description: Y coordinate of the binding box center

center_z.description: Z coordinate of the binding box center

size_x.description: Width of the binding box along X axis (Angstroms)

size_y.description: Width of the binding box along Y axis (Angstroms)

size_z.description: Width of the binding box along Z axis (Angstroms)

cnn_scoring.description: CNN scoring mode for pose evaluation

n_poses.description: Number of binding poses to generate
